frontmatter.name: external-surface-audit
frontmatter.description: Reusable playbook for external application security reviews focused on publicly reachable data exposure, weak backend authorization, insecure onboarding and invite flows, leaked internal assets, and other passive or low-impact findings across Supabase and non-Supabase stacks.

title: External Surface Audit
description: Passive or low-impact playbook for auditing public applications for exposed data, weak anonymous access, public RPCs, storage leaks, insecure onboarding flows, and related external findings.
